sentences.english: Thank you for calling QuickNet support. My name is Daniel. How can I help you today?
sentences.korean: 퀵넷 지원센터에 전화 주셔서 감사합니다. 저는 대니얼입니다. 어떻게 도와드릴까요?

sentences.english: Hi Daniel. My internet has been down since this morning. I can't connect to Wi-Fi at all.
sentences.korean: 안녕 대니얼. 오늘 아침부터 인터넷이 안 돼요. 와이파이에 아예 연결이 안 됩니다.

sentences.english: I'm sorry about that. Let me look into it for you. Can I have your account number?
Thank you. I can see your account here. Let's try a few troubleshooting steps. First, can you check if the lights on your router are on?
sentences.korean: 감사합니다. 계정이 보이네요. 문제 해결 단계를 시도해봐요. 먼저 라우터의 불이 켜져 있는지 확인해주세요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: TED-Style Talk — The Science of Habits

sentences.english: Yes, the power light is on, but the internet light is blinking orange.
sentences.korean: 네, 전원등은 켜져 있는데 인터넷 등이 주황색으로 깜박이고 있어요.

sentences.english: That usually means the router isn't receiving a signal. Let's try restarting it. Can you unplug the power cable, wait about thirty seconds, and plug it back in?
sentences.korean: 보통 라우터가 신호를 못 받고 있다는 뜻이에요. 재시작해봐요. 전원 케이블을 뽑고, 10초 정도 기다렸다가 다시 꽂아주세요.

sentences.english: Okay, hold on... done. It's restarting now.
sentences.korean: 네, 잠시만요... 됐어요. 지금 재시작 중이에요.

sentences.english: Great. Give it about two minutes to fully boot up. Let me know when all the lights are stable.
sentences.korean: 좋아요. 완전히 부팅될 때까지 약 2분 정도 기다려주세요. 모든 불이 안정되면 알려주세요.

sentences.english: Alright... the internet light just turned green!
sentences.korean: 좋아요... 인터넷 등이 방금 초록색으로 바뀌었어요!

sentences.english: Perfect. Try connecting to Wi-Fi now and see if it works.
sentences.korean: 좋아요. 이제 와이파이에 연결해보시고 되는지 확인해보세요.

sentences.english: Yes! It's working! That was easy. Thank you so much, Daniel.
sentences.korean: 네! 돼요! 쉬웠네요. 정말 감사합니다, 대니얼.

sentences.english: Happy to help. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
sentences.korean: 도와드려서 기뻐요. 다른 도움이 필요하신 건 없나요?

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
